personalInfo.name: MIKITA KAVALIOU
personalInfo.title: PHP Engineer | Laravel & Symfony
personalInfo.professionalObjective: PHP Engineer specializing in Laravel and Symfony ecosystems. Expert in secure multi-tenant SaaS architectures, PostgreSQL optimization, and fintech integrations (Stripe Connect) for mission-critical applications.
personalInfo.status: Based in Grenoble, France | VPF Visa – Free access to the French job market

experience.title: PHP Engineer
responsibilities: Laravel/Symfony Architecture: Architected mission-critical APIs using Laravel 11 and Symfony 6/7, enforcing Clean Architecture and SOLID principles.
Database Optimization: Optimized PostgreSQL configurations and queries, resulting in a 30% reduction in API response times.
Security & Compliance: Designed secure multi-tenant architectures with field-level encryption, managing sensitive data for thousands of users.
Containerized PHP applications with Docker and managed cloud infrastructure on AWS (EC2, RDS), implementing CI/CD pipelines for automated zero-downtime deployments.
Implemented automated test suites (PHPUnit/Pest) with 85% code coverage, enforcing quality gates in CI/CD to prevent regression during rapid deployments.

experience.title: Freelance PHP Developer
responsibilities: Lexity (EdTech) : Orchestrated modularization of a PHP backend into Symfony 7 services using the Strangler Fig pattern (100% uptime), architected mission-critical APIs with API Platform and Doctrine ORM.

ZIRO.FIT (Marketplace) : Architected high-throughput data layers using LATERAL JOINs and materialized views (80% DB load reduction), developed Stripe Connect workflows for multi-party payouts with KYC verification.
Interly (Coaching IA) : Built Lexity MVP and Interly MVP from scratch (Next.js, Prisma, PostgreSQL), implemented automated test suites (PHPUnit/Pest) at 85% code coverage.

experience.title: PHP Developer
responsibilities: Developed PHP/Laravel web application modules in Agile teams, mastering professional PHP architecture patterns and production code standards through structured collaboration.
Optimized complex SQL queries and Doctrine ORM performance, reducing slowest-query response times by 35% on high-traffic endpoints.

education.institution: Minsk State Higher College of Radiotechnics
education.description: Program covering analog/digital electronics and low-level microcontroller programming (C, Assembly).
Advanced coursework in embedded systems, mobile development (Java/Kotlin), and real-time architectures.
